entries.text:
Verse 5

world

kosmos = mankind. (See Scofield "Matthew 4:8").

Verse 12

natural brute beasts

natural animals without reason. Judges 1:10.

Verse 14

sin

Sin. (See Scofield "Romans 3:23").

Verse 15

Balaam

Balaam. (See Scofield "Numbers 22:5") was the typical hireling prophet, anxious only to make a market of his gift. This is the "way" of Balaam. See the "error" of Balaam, See Scofield "Judges 1:11" and the "doctrine" of Balaam, See Scofield "Revelation 2:14".

Verse 20

world kosmos = world-system.

1 John 2:15-17; John 7:7 (See Scofield "Revelation 13:8")

Saviour (See Scofield "Romans 1:16")
